title: nicoraella obtusa
intro: Nicoraella obtusa, also known as the Chinese club moss, is a rare and endangered species of plant that belongs to the order Lycopodiales. Traditionally, Nicoraella obtusa has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nicoraella obtusa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
